Title: Relates to airport noise studies metrics
Summary: Directs the commissioner of health to undertake a study utilizing a uniform metric for measuring noise impacts that will be used by airports for the purpose of noise exposure maps and noise compatibility programs.
LawCode: Add Art 13 Title 14 §§1389-hh & 1389-ii, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to airport noise studies
